verificationReason: Parent scaffold only; child implementation and full verification have not run.

orchestrationDecisions.reason: Create the isolated parent branch, durable plan, draft parent PR, and child issue contracts before mutating workers start.
Three read-only subagents inspect baseline architecture, characterization tests, and control-plane design without sharing mutation authority.
Draft parent PR #324 and fourteen native child issues #325-#338 were created before the first mutating worker dispatch.
Issue #325 was assigned to an isolated Codex worker; all other implementation issues remain dependency-blocked.
